prompt: I want to add a new skill, like a repl skill similar to the ping one but this one should do like a health check on the worker pool. It should dispatch a simple query to each worker and report back latency and whether they responded. Put it next to the ping skill I guess. And make sure the skill registry picks it up automatically.

assertions.text: Identifies repl_skills/ping.py as the template to follow
References DispatchConfig in dispatch.py for worker pool context
References skills/catalog.py for prompt-visible skill registration
Includes specific line numbers in an appendix or reference table
Preserves the original transcription verbatim in a blockquote or clearly marked section
Adds testing steps (expansion tests, registry tests) not in the original transcription
Notes source expansion requirement — AST rewriter interaction, llm_query_batched sync form
Contains a delegation blockquote instructing assignment to Agent Team teammates with red/green TDD and showboat demo
Each implementation step is phrased as 'Spawn a `<AgentName>` teammate to [action]'
Contains a Provider-Fake Fixture & TDD section with fixture names, essential requirements, and TDD sequence
Mentions `uvx showboat` demo documentation for proving changes work
